title: Kalaratri Chalisa
intro: Shri Kalaratri Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Kalaratri
description:
|| Shri Kaalratri Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Jai Ambe Kali, jagat ki palanhari.
Kaalratri mata, dukh haran hamari.
Jo dhyan dharai bhakt man, sur nar muni ubari.
Kaalratri vandana karai, sada sukhnidhi dayi.

|| Chalisa ||
Jayati jai jai Kaalratri mata.
Dukh door karo hamari trata.
Rudra roop dhari maa Mahakali.
Bhakton ki sun lo karuna pali.
Simhavahini savari tuhari.
Asur sanharini khadga dharini.
Rakt beej ka kiya sanhar.
Chand-Mund ka kate sir vaar.
Trinetradhari Mahakali Amba.
Sab devta karen tuj par namba.
Tum ho Durga, tum ho Bhavani.
Sankat harni Kali kalyani.
Shatru sanharini Chamunda mata.
Aghor roop tere sabko bhata.
Shakti roop tera koi na jaane.
Bhakt tere gun gaayein bakhaane.
Kalika maa tuj pranavain hum.
Tera charan chhukar vandan karain hum.
Kripa kar maa sankat harni.
Bhakt janon ke man ko tarani.
Chamakti jwala roop tuhara.
Jo dekhe darke bhage sara.
Mahakali ke charitra nirale.
Devi teri mahima matwale.
Deenan ke tum sahare ho.
Jo teri bhakti mein khoye so.
Jai jai mata, jai Kaalratri.
Sankat harni, bhakton ki trata.

|| Doha ||
Kaalratri maa ki mahima aparmpar.
Jo bhi bhaje, hoy usaka uddhar.
Sampurna chalisa padhe jo koi.
Mukt hoy dukh sab hoy sukhdai.
meaning:
|| Shri Kaalratri Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Jai Ambe Kali, jagat ki palanhari.
(Victory to Mother Kali, the nourisher of the world)
Kaalratri mata, dukh haran hamari.
(Mother Kaalratri, remove our sorrows)
Jo dhyan dharai bhakt man, sur nar muni ubari.
(The devotee who meditates upon you is saved by gods and sages)
Kaalratri vandana karai, sada sukhnidhi dayi.
(Those who worship Kaalratri, you give eternal happiness)

|| Chalisa ||
Jayati jai jai Kaalratri mata.
(Victory, victory to Mother Kaalratri)
Dukh door karo hamari trata.
(O Savior, remove our miseries)
Rudra roop dhari maa Mahakali.
(Mother Mahakali, you hold the fierce form)
Bhakton ki sun lo karuna pali.
(Listen to the compassionate pleas of your devotees)
Simhavahini savari tuhari.
(Lion is your vehicle)
Asur sanharini khadga dharini.
(Destroyer of demons, holder of the sword)
Rakt beej ka kiya sanhar.
(You destroyed Raktbeeja)
Chand-Mund ka kate sir vaar.
(You cut off the heads of Chand and Mund)
Trinetradhari Mahakali Amba.
(Three-eyed Mother Mahakali)
Sab devta karen tuj par namba.
(All gods bow down to you)
Tum ho Durga, tum ho Bhavani.
(You are Durga, you are Bhavani)
Sankat harni Kali kalyani.
(Trouble-remover Kali, the auspicious one)
Shatru sanharini Chamunda mata.
(Destroyer of enemies, Mother Chamunda)
Aghor roop tere sabko bhata.
(Your fierce form is loved by all)
Shakti roop tera koi na jaane.
(No one knows the extent of your power)
Bhakt tere gun gaayein bakhaane.
(Your devotees sing your praises)
Kalika maa tuj pranavain hum.
(Mother Kalika, we bow to you)
Tera charan chhukar vandan karain hum.
(We touch your feet and worship you)
Kripa kar maa sankat harni.
(Show mercy, Mother, remover of crises)
Bhakt janon ke man ko tarani.
(Savior of the devotees' minds)
Chamakti jwala roop tuhara.
(Your form is like a blazing flame)
Jo dekhe darke bhage sara.
(Whoever sees it, all fear and flee)
Mahakali ke charitra nirale.
(The legends of Mahakali are unique)
Devi teri mahima matwale.
(O Goddess, your glory is intoxicating)
Deenan ke tum sahare ho.
(You are the support of the downtrodden)
Jo teri bhakti mein khoye so.
(Those who are lost in your devotion)
Jai jai mata, jai Kaalratri.
(Victory, victory to Mother Kaalratri)
Sankat harni, bhakton ki trata.
(Remover of troubles, savior of devotees)

|| Doha ||
Kaalratri maa ki mahima aparmpar.
(Mother Kaalratri's glory is infinite)
Jo bhi bhaje, hoy usaka uddhar.
(Whoever worships you, attains salvation)
Sampurna chalisa padhe jo koi.
(Whoever reads this complete Chalisa)
Mukt hoy dukh sab hoy sukhdai.
(Becomes free from all sorrows and attains happiness)

faq.q1: What is the appearance of Maa Kalaratri?
faq.a1: Maa Kalaratri has a fierce and intense appearance. Her complexion is as dark as the night, she has disheveled hair, and she rides a donkey. She has three round eyes that resemble the cosmos.
faq.q2: What is the main benefit of worshiping her?
faq.a2: Maa Kalaratri is the destroyer of darkness and negative energies. Worshiping her frees the devotee from the fear of enemies, untimely death, and nightmares. She bestows courage and fearlessness.
faq.a3: Maa Kalaratri governs the 'Sahasrara Chakra' (Crown Chakra). Her meditation helps in attaining the highest level of consciousness.
faq.q4: When is the auspicious day to worship her?
faq.a4: The seventh day of Navratri (Saptami) is dedicated to Maa Kalaratri.
faq.q5: What is the appropriate offering (Bhog) for her?
faq.a5: Jaggery (Gur) is the favorite offering for Maa Kalaratri. It is believed that by offering jaggery, the Goddess is pleased and eradicates ailments and negativities.
